title: crocus × luteus
intro: Crocus × luteus, also known as the daffodil or trumpet daffodil, is a hybrid flower derived from the Crocus sativus and Crocus cartwrightianus species. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to inhibit the growth of certain bacteria and fungi. The health benefits of Crocus × luteus include its potential to lower cholesterol levels, improve heart health, and exhibit anti-inflammatory properties. The herbal preparations of Crocus × luteus include dried flowers and bulbs, which can be used to make teas, tinctures, and capsules, although further research is necessary to fully understand its uses and effects.
